title: Jelly's Mod
description: A Five Nights at Freddy's inspired mod with custom animatronics, blocks, and items!
body:
![skullix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12f36b2c75063ab9377d7ae63cdd39e1bd477e31.png)

![Jelly's Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc10c22597b43cf343d31eb13f53b50d52189fb8.png)

Hey, You!
Welcome to **Jelly's Mod**. A FNaF inspired mod featuring **_custom animatronics_**, and **_familiar faces_**.

# REQUIRES
- **GECKOLIB**

The mod is in **VERY EARLY ALPHA** with very few additions, but more are on the way!

## What you can expect!

- Decorations and Blocks to help build your own dream pizzaria!
- PLUSHIES!
- 6 Animatronics
- Custom Biome

![devs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b995ba594d34c31ab5d73b3634d152e20660defd_0.webp)
# DIRECTOR
- **Vermetra**

# Coding
- **Vermetra**
- **ItzZyphron**

# Modeling
- **Vermetra**

# Texturing
- **Vermetra**

# Animations
- **Vermetra**

## What are you waiting for, a kiss on the cheek?
**Download Now!**
